programme.title: Life on the Rock

programme.desc: Witness the Eucharistic devotion and spirituality of the Franciscan Order on St. Francis of Assisi, St. Clare, St. Paschal Baylon and St. Padre Pio.
programme.title: His Body and Blood -- Franciscan Saints on the Eucharist

programme.desc: Solemnity of Corpus Christi Mass and Procession From the Shrine of the Most Blessed Sacrament The Franciscan Missionaries of the Eternal Word preside over Benediction and the Procession of Corpus Christi at the Shrine of the Most Blessed Sacrament in Hanceville, Alabama.
programme.title: Sunday Mass

programme.desc: The dramatic life of St. Philip Neri, often called the Third Apostle of Rome, who was guided by Our Lord to seek out and catechize the poor and abandoned youth of his adopted city.
programme.title: Saint Philip Neri Part 2

programme.desc: Holy Family Solar Led Garden Statue An assortment of religious articles from around the world.
programme.title: EWTN Religious Catalogue

programme.desc: S01 E04 — The Doctors of The Church: St. Augstine of Hippo, pt. 1 Through dramatic reenactments, Dr. Matthew Bunson explores the lives of the time-honored Doctors of the Church and how they continue to proclaim the Gospel to the modern world.
programme.title: The Doctors of the Church

programme.desc: Meeting With Parliament Pope Leo in Spain
programme.title: Pope Leo in Spain

programme.desc: Work And The World The filmmakers explore how people are called to excellence and responsibility rather than mediocrity and disengagement.
programme.title: Into the Breach: the Dignity of Work

programme.desc: Meeting With The Bishops Of Spain Pope Leo in Spain
programme.title: Pope Leo in Spain

programme.desc: Putting Work In Its Place Deacon Patrick Toole discusses the meaning of leisure and the importance of rightly ordered priorities.
programme.title: Into the Breach: the Dignity of Work

programme.desc: Mother Angelica and the Nuns of Our Lady of the Angels Monastery ask for the intercession of the Prince of the Heavenly Hosts and the nine Choirs of Angels, as they pray the chaplet of St. Michael.
programme.title: The Chaplet of St. Michael

programme.desc: S01 E03 — Joyful Mysteries Fr. Mitch Pacwa leads the Joyful Mysteries of the Rosary from the actual holy sites and shrines where they took place, bringing the Gospels to life and offering a deeper understanding of the Rosary meditations.
programme.title: Holy Land Rosary

programme.desc: The Franciscan Missionaries of the Eternal Word recite the litany of the Divine Child Jesus from the Shrine of the Most Blessed Sacrament in Hanceville, Ala.
programme.title: The Litany of the Divine Child Jesus

programme.title: Daily Mass

programme.title: Land of Israel: God's Story

programme.desc: In the wake of the Portuguese Inquisition, on April 19, 1506, a three-day-long massacre led to the slaughter of 3,000 Jews in Lisbon. The fires shot as high as houses, in a city filled with quartered bodies and heads paraded on the points of spears.
programme.title: 1506 - The Lisbon Genocide

programme.desc: Exploring the abduction of 2,000 Jewish children in Portugal following their expulsion from Spain and arrival in Portugal in 1492, an unresolved chapter that still haunts the Jewish community today. Produced by the Jewish Community of Porto.
programme.title: 2,000 Kidnapped Jewish Children
